title: Kuro’s Ambition Collapses
description: On pages 12–15, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Damn hypnotist, you can't do any- thing now.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Can I do it at this distance?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What!! He caught up with me!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I should finish you off quickly!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It's too late now, Hara- maki-kid!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Good!! That tree branch was blocking the way

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Now your three year plan will fail

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Wait a minute... if he wins, then we won't be killed....!!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
